title: Red’s More Structures
description: Adds more structures and dungeons to Minecraft
body:
Red’s More Structures adds new structures to Minecraft Java 1.19 [Fabric] and [Forge], making the world a more exciting place with new structures to explore. All structures contain loot, and some you can also encounter enemies. In this first version, Red’s More Structures is still in testing, since these structures can generate very close or far from each other.

2 Download Options Available:
* Common Spawn Rate
* Rare Spawn Rate

![Red’s More Structures [Fabric & Forge]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/astW1KNr/images/32d76259854da3fe06523594fd48d137ddfb1ec2.webp)

[Red’s More Structures Data Pack](https://www.redstonegames.com.br/reds-more-structures-data-pack-for-minecraft-java-1-19/)
